Your Vision Is Our Craft

Bathroom remodeling, basement finishing, and custom decks in Bozeman. 3D design previews, transparent estimates, and a contractor who actually calls you back.

Get Started See Our Work
Licensed & Insured 5+ Years in Bozeman 3D Design Previews Transparent Pricing

Bathroom Remodeling, Basement Finishing & Custom Carpentry in Bozeman

I'm Eric, and I run Heartwood Craft — a one-person remodeling company built on the idea that you should see exactly what you're getting before construction starts, know exactly what it costs, and hear from me every single day until the job is done.

What You Get That Other Contractors Don't

These aren't marketing claims. This is how every Heartwood Craft project actually works.

3D Design Previews

I build a 3D rendering of your bathroom before demo day. You see exactly what your space will look like — tile patterns, fixture placement, vanity layout — and we adjust until it's right. No surprises on reveal day.

Transparent, Itemized Estimates

Your estimate shows every line item: labor by trade, materials by item, allowances for selections you haven't made yet. You see where every dollar goes. If tile is budgeted at $1,500 and you find something for $1,200, you keep the $300.

Daily Photo Updates

During construction, I text you a photo every day with a progress update. You always know what happened today and what's planned for tomorrow. No radio silence. No wondering what's going on in your house.

Milestone Payments Tied to Progress

You pay in 4 milestones tied to real progress: 30% at signing, 20% at rough-in, 40% at substantial completion, 10% at final walkthrough. Your money follows the work, not the other way around.

Bathroom Remodeling

Your bathroom is 20 years old and every morning is a fight for counter space. The grout is stained, the tub takes up half the room, and the fixtures belong in a time capsule.

I specialize in bathroom remodels — from full gut renovations to targeted refreshes. Every project starts with a 3D rendering so you see your new space before I pick up a hammer.

Learn more →

Basement Finishing

That 800 square feet downstairs holds boxes and a treadmill nobody uses. It could be a home office, a guest suite, or the room your kids actually want to hang out in.

I handle everything — egress windows, moisture control, electrical, framing, and finishing — so you get a space that's warm, dry, and built to code.

Learn more →

Custom Decks & Exterior Work

Montana summers are short. A well-built deck means you use every one of them. I build cedar and composite decks designed for Bozeman's freeze-thaw cycles, with proper footings, flashing, and hardware that won't fail in five years.

From simple platforms to multi-level outdoor living spaces — built for the weather and built to last.

Explore services →

Serving Bozeman, Belgrade & Gallatin Gateway

I'm based in Bozeman and work across the Gallatin Valley. Whether you're in a 1970s ranch near campus, a newer build in Belgrade, or a mountain property in Gallatin Gateway — I know the housing stock, the codes, and the local suppliers.

Bozeman Belgrade Gallatin Gateway

See exactly how a project works, from first call to final walkthrough →

Bathroom Remodeling

From outdated to outstanding — custom tile, 3D design previews, and craftsmanship that lasts.

What Our Clients Say

★★★★★
Working with Eric on our bathroom remodel was seamless. He is an excellent communicator, provides clear estimates, and his attention to detail is unmatched. I appreciated his thoughtful recommendations throughout the process to ensure the space was functional and beautiful at the end. We would absolutely work with Heartwood Craft again.
Rachel Dempsey Bozeman, MT
via Google
★★★★★
Working with Heartwood Craft was a pleasure. Eric was easy to work with and very thorough. He provided clear mock-ups and estimates. I also learned a lot in the process. I would not hesitate to reach out to him for any future project we have.
Ashley Phillips Belgrade, MT
via Google

Eric did a great job on my deck replacement. He has great skills and experience. He was really good at communicating, totally responsible and I would certainly use him again. Thanks Eric.
